Hub Home > training-and-knowledge > Employee Training Module Builder

Employee Training Module Builder

Create a complete training module for any role or skill — learning objectives, lesson content, practical exercises, assessment questions, and a manager facilitation guide. Works for onboarding, compliance, tool training, or skill development.

Intermediate STEP BY STEP Time-saving
Pro tip

Record yourself explaining the topic to a new hire for 10 minutes, then paste the transcript. AI will structure it into a polished module far faster than writing from scratch.

training onboarding learning employee development course module assessment

Prompt Variants by Model

Claude Claude 4.x
FRESH APR 2026 
You are an instructional designer building training content for a small business.

<training_brief>
Topic: [WHAT the training covers — e.g., "How to handle customer complaints", "Using our CRM", "Q1...
You are an instructional designer building training content for a small business.

<training_brief>
Topic: [WHAT the training covers — e.g., "How to handle customer complaints", "Using our CRM", "Q1...

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 74 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

You are an instructional designer building training content for a small business.

<training_brief>
Topic: [WHAT the training covers — e.g., "How to handle customer complaints", "Using our CRM", "Q1 product updates"]
Audience: [WHO — role, experience level, team size]
Learning goal: [What should they be able to DO after this training?]
Time budget: [How long should the training take? e.g., "30 minutes", "2 hours"]
Format preference: [self-paced document / live workshop / video script / interactive]
Existing materials: [any SOPs, docs, or notes to build from — paste or describe]
</training_brief>

Build the complete training module:

1. **Learning objectives** — 3-5 specific, measurable outcomes (use action verbs: demonstrate, apply, identify, create).

2. **Module outline** — sections with time allocation, ordered for progressive difficulty.

3. **Lesson content** — full written content for each section. Include explanations, real-world examples specific to the business, and common mistakes to avoid.

4. **Practical exercises** — 2-3 hands-on activities per section. Include scenario-based exercises, not just knowledge recall.

5. **Assessment** — 10 questions mixing multiple choice (6), scenario-based (3), and one practical task. Include answer key with explanations.

6. **Manager facilitation guide** — talking points, discussion questions, and how to evaluate whether the training worked.

7. **Quick reference card** — a one-page cheat sheet the employee can keep at their desk.
Notes: Claude excels at structured educational content. For tool training, paste the actual UI descriptions or screenshots. For process training, paste your existing SOP and Claude will restructure it into learning-optimized format.
ChatGPT GPT-5
FRESH APR 2026 
Act as an instructional designer who creates training programs for small business teams.

Build me a complete training module.

Topic:...
Act as an instructional designer who creates training programs for small business teams.

Build me a complete training module.

Topic:...

Your email unlocks all 74 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

Act as an instructional designer who creates training programs for small business teams.

Build me a complete training module.

Topic: [WHAT]
Audience: [WHO — role, experience level]
Goal: [what they should DO afterward]
Time: [duration]
Format: [self-paced / workshop / video script / interactive]
Existing materials: [paste or describe]

Create:
1. 3-5 measurable learning objectives (action verbs)
2. Module outline with time allocation
3. Full lesson content per section with examples and common mistakes
4. 2-3 practical exercises per section (scenario-based)
5. 10-question assessment (6 MC + 3 scenario + 1 practical) with answer key
6. Manager facilitation guide with discussion questions
7. One-page quick reference card
Notes: Ask ChatGPT to create the module as an interactive conversation — it can role-play as both the trainer and a confused new hire to test whether the content actually works.

Your email unlocks all 74 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

Build a training module for my team.

**Topic:** [WHAT]
**Audience:** [WHO — role, level]
**Goal:** [what they should do afterward]
**Time:** [duration]
**Format:** [self-paced / workshop / video / interactive]
**Existing materials:** [paste or describe]

Research best practices for training on this topic, then create:
1. 3-5 measurable learning objectives
2. Module outline with timing
3. Full lesson content with examples and mistakes to avoid
4. Practical exercises (scenario-based)
5. 10-question assessment with answer key
6. Manager facilitation guide
7. Quick reference card
Notes: Gemini can research industry-standard training approaches for your specific topic. If the content references tools or processes with documentation online, Gemini can pull in current details.

Your email unlocks all 74 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

Create a training module for my team.

Topic: [WHAT]
Audience: [WHO — role, level]
Goal: [what they do afterward]
Time: [duration]
Format: [self-paced / workshop / video / interactive]
Existing materials: [paste or describe]

Build:
1. Learning objectives (3-5, measurable)
2. Outline with timing
3. Full lesson content with examples
4. Practical exercises
5. Assessment (10 questions) with answer key
6. Manager guide
7. Quick reference card
Notes: Copilot can generate the module directly in Word with proper formatting, or create a PowerPoint presentation for workshop delivery. The quick reference card works well as a one-slide summary in PowerPoint.
